metadata.desc: Controls framework default LLM replies based on an allowlist. Users in the allowlist trigger LLM normally, others are silently skipped or receive a custom reply.

admin_bypass.hint: When enabled, AstrBot admins bypass the allowlist and always trigger the framework default LLM reply. Note: admin detection only works on aiocqhttp (OneBot).

allowlist.hint: One line per platform, format: platform[UID1,UID2,...]. Users in the allowlist trigger the framework default LLM reply normally, others are silently skipped.

reply_msg.hint: One line per platform, format: platform[reply]. Non-allowlisted users receive the platform-specific reply. Replies attempt quote reply first, then @ reply, then plain text.
